## Research Summary: Building a Bot for moff-station-14

---

### 1. Headless Client Mode — Real and Functional

The `--headless` flag exists and is fully implemented. When passed, `GameController` sets `DisplayMode.Headless`, which swaps in `ClydeHeadless` (no window) and `HeadlessAudioManager` (no audio) via IoC. The game loop still runs with `SleepMode.Delay` instead of vsync-linked timing.
